channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: You Can Soon Buy a $4,370 Humanoid Robot on AliExpress
item.description: Unitree is bringing its R1 to international markets. It arrives with some aerobatic capabilities and an entry-level price, but the question of what you'd actually do with it remains open.

item.title: 'A secret agreement': Microsoft urges judge to throw out claims it colluded with OpenAI to boost ChatGPT prices — could this be the needle to pop the AI bubble?
item.description: Microsoft seeks to throw out lawsuit from ChatGPT Plus subscribers alleging its agreement with OpenAI led to inflated prices.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, April 14 (game #1541)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, April 14 (game #1038)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, April 14 (game #772)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Exit 8 director Genki Kawamura on why he adapted the indie horror game into a movie: 'It reminded me of purgatory'
item.description: Exit 8's director Genki Kawamura compared Exit 8's story as he explained why he was so interested in adapting the game.

item.title: Forget Dr Doolittle, study finds animals might not only want to use tech, but they also want to talk to us with it — and it could be 'incredibly powerful for the future of conservation'
item.description: Zoo study shows shared human-animal technology experiences increase lemur interaction and improve visitor engagement with wildlife.

item.title: Inquiètudes autour du modèle Mythos | Le ministre de l’IA doit rencontrer les dirigeants d’Anthropic
item.description: Le ministre chargé de l’intelligence artificielle, Evan Solomon, a déclaré qu’il rencontrerait mardi les dirigeants d’Anthropic afin de répondre aux inquiétudes mondiales suscitées par le nouveau modèle d’IA de l’entreprise.

item.title: The Mercedes EQS returns with massive range and charging gains
item.description: A year ago, Mercedes-Benz did the prudent thing and paused its EQ lineup of electric vehicles in the US. With customer demand drying up for luxury EVs, and federal incentives getting axed by vengeful Republicans, Mercedes put its first-generation EVs on ice. But then, in January, Mercedes quietly reintroduced the EQS brand in the US, […]

item.title: Plus de 925 km d’autonomie : Mercedes assomme la concurrence avec sa nouvelle EQS électrique
item.description: Le constructeur allemand revoit en profondeur sa grande berline électrique sans pour autant la refaire de zéro. Résultat : une EQS mieux armée sur le papier, avec des chiffres d'autonomie et de recharge qui s'annoncent parmi les meilleurs du segment.

item.title: Je suis monté à bord de la nouvelle Mercedes-Benz EQS : 925 km d’autonomie et un grand coup de pression face à la concurrence chinoise
item.description: La Mercedes EQS existe depuis 2021, et on commençait à bien la connaître. 5 ans plus tard, le constructeur de Stuttgart revient avec une version profondément remaniée de sa grande voiture électrique : nouveau système électrique, nouvelle architecture logicielle, et une autonomie annoncée qui flirte avec les 1 000 kilomètres. On l'a découverte en statique et voici ce qu'on en pense. ...

item.title: This Memory Chip Survives Temperatures Hotter Than Lava
item.description: “You may call it a revolution. It is the best high-temperature memory ever demonstrated.”

item.title: I'm now 160 hours into Crimson Desert, and I've still not covered half of its map — and that's exactly why it's so good
item.description: Crimson Desert just continues to get better as my playtime increases, and it's a sign of Pearl Abyss' brilliant work.

item.title: Get in on this exclusive Babbel language learning offer through StackSocial
item.description: Get lifetime access to Babbel and learn 14 languages with expert-designed lessons focused on real conversations for $159 with code LEARN.
